creator: wefa@callcenter.systemhaus.net
text:
the distfile gd1.3.tar.gz has disappeared from all listed 
master sites, including ftp.freebsd.org.

It seems to be available on some mirrors, though.

Fix: 

get it from (e.g) ftp4.de.freebsd.org and put it
to ftp.freebsd.org again.
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/graphics/gd
make fetch
